name: Pre-existing diabetes worsened by night shifts in Draper—claimable?

mainEntity.name: Pre-existing diabetes worsened by night shifts in Draper—claimable?

acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, if shifts substantially aggravated it beyond normal life risks.[3] Utah compensates work 'lighting up' conditions.[3] Key factors: medical proof of causation, exposure logs. Specialist opinion critical; file emphasizing aggravation. Viable with strong evidence.
